docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 70398111)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-15-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 68753374) TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 68753374) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68753374) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CHIRUMAMILLA, VIDISHA NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-2023
DECLARATION PURUSANT TO 395(B): VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 68753374) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-15-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
